creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192587
py-pyIOSXR-0.53.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates py-pyIOSXR to 0.53.

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/fooelisa/pyiosxr/releases/tag/0.53

Changes to the port:
- RUN_DEPENDS for security/py-netmiko has been set accordingly to the new requirements given by upstream.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.1-RELEASE amd64 + i386) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
